name: -it / -instruct / -chat
oneliner: -it (Google Gemma), -Instruct (Meta Llama, Mistral), -Chat (Qwen 1/2). Same concept, different branding. Designed for instruction-following.
explanation: All mean: SFT + alignment applied. Qwen shifted from -Chat to -Instruct in Qwen2.5. The distinction between -instruct and -chat is branding, not technical.
